subcodes.first_line: O Lord, my Hope and my Aspiration! Verily do I lay my brow in the dust trodden by the countenances of them that are near unto Thee, and I kiss the lips of them that are sincere [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: رب و رجائی و منائی انی امرغ جبینی بمعفر جباه المقربین و مقبل شفاه المخلصین
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for the departed, @firmness in the Covenant, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
